templates.title: Nocturne
templates.description: Nightscout-compatible diabetes management API with Row Level Security and multi-tenancy.
templates.note: After deployment, configure data connectors (Dexcom, LibreLinkUp, etc.) through the Nocturne UI.

env.name: INSTANCE_KEY
env.label: Instance key
env.description: Minimum 12 characters — used for JWT signing and service authentication

env.name: POSTGRES_PASSWORD
env.label: PostgreSQL bootstrap password
env.description: Used only at first container start to create runtime roles

env.name: POSTGRES_MIGRATOR_PASSWORD
env.label: Migrator role password
env.description: Password for nocturne_migrator — owns the schema, runs EF migrations

env.name: POSTGRES_APP_PASSWORD
env.label: App role password
env.description: Password for nocturne_app — runtime role, cannot bypass Row Level Security

env.name: POSTGRES_WEB_PASSWORD
env.label: Web role password
env.description: Password for nocturne_web — used by the SvelteKit bot state adapter

env.name: DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN
env.label: Discord — Bot token
env.description: Optional. Leave blank to disable the Discord bot.

env.name: DISCORD_PUBLIC_KEY
env.label: Discord — Public key
env.description: Optional. Required if Discord bot token is set.

env.name: DISCORD_APPLICATION_ID
env.label: Discord — Application ID
env.description: Optional. Required if Discord bot token is set.

env.name: DISCORD_CLIENT_SECRET
env.label: Discord — Client secret
env.description: Optional. Required if Discord bot token is set.

env.name: TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN
env.label: Telegram — Bot token
env.description: Optional. Leave blank to disable the Telegram bot.

env.name: TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_SECRET_TOKEN
env.label: Telegram — Webhook secret token
env.description: Optional. Required if Telegram bot token is set.

env.name: SLACK_BOT_TOKEN
env.label: Slack — Bot token
env.description: Optional. Leave blank to disable the Slack bot.

env.name: SLACK_SIGNING_SECRET
env.label: Slack — Signing secret
env.description: Optional. Required if Slack bot token is set.

env.name: WHATSAPP_ACCESS_TOKEN
env.label: WhatsApp — Access token
env.description: Optional. Leave blank to disable the WhatsApp bot.

env.name: WHATSAPP_VERIFY_TOKEN
env.label: WhatsApp — Verify token
env.description: Optional. Required if WhatsApp access token is set.

env.name: WHATSAPP_APP_SECRET
env.label: WhatsApp — App secret
env.description: Optional. Required if WhatsApp access token is set.

env.name: WHATSAPP_PHONE_NUMBER_ID
env.label: WhatsApp — Phone number ID
env.description: Optional. Required if WhatsApp access token is set.
